topic.title: Print Head Alignment
topic.shortdesc: If your printouts become grainy or blurry, you notice misalignment of vertical lines, or you

body.p: If your printouts become grainy or blurry, you notice misalignment of vertical lines, or you see dark or light horizontal bands, you may need to align the print head.
body.note: Banding may also occur if your print head nozzles need cleaning.
